message:
fix(attestation,lockstep,receipt): bind issued_at_ns into attestation signature, expand lockstep oracle error context, and refactor receipt verification pipeline

attested_execution_cell.rs:
- Moved issued_at_ns from a caller-set mutable field into the
  TrustRootBackend::attest() signature so the timestamp is included
  in the attestation quote from creation. Added signature_payload()
  method that produces canonical bytes covering measurement, nonce,
  issued_at_ns, validity_window_ns, trust_level, platform, and
  signer_key_id — all fields are now integrity-bound by the signature.
- SoftwareTrustRoot::verify() now checks signer_key_id match and
  verifies the signature before trusting any mutable quote metadata,
  preventing a class of attacks where an adversary could tamper with
  issued_at_ns, trust_level, or platform fields without detection.
- Added tests for tampered issued_at, trust_level, platform,
  signer_key_id, and cross-root verification rejection.

attestation_handshake.rs:
- Updated CellHandshakeClient::build_response() to pass timestamp_ns
  directly to trust_root.attest() instead of mutating the quote after
  creation.

frx_lockstep_oracle.rs:
- Added FrxInvalidCaseContext capture before evaluate_case() call so
  error context is available when case evaluation fails.
- Extended oracle evaluation with additional validation.

offline_synthesis_pipeline.rs:
- Minor fix in synthesis pipeline.

outcome_capability_narrowing.rs:
- Added new narrowing validation logic.

receipt_verifier_pipeline.rs:
- Refactored receipt verification pipeline for clarity and
  correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
